ddls:
CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "arrest_number" INTEGER /* Arrest number assigned to the incident */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the arrestee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the arrestee */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the arrestee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the arrestee */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency that made the arrest */,
  "original_book_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the arrest was originally booked */,
  "bond_total_amount" REAL /* Total bond amount for the arrest */,
  "sex_dv_charge" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the charge involves a sexual/domestic violence issue */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the arrest as active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_agency_name FOREIGN KEY ("agency_name") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with this charge */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "charge_status" TEXT /* Current status of the charge */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime associated with the charge */,
  "bond_type" TEXT /* Type of bond applicable to the charge */,
  "bond_amount" REAL /* Bond amount set for the charge */,
  "is_felony" INTEGER /* Flag to mark the charge as a felony */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_types" (
  "bond_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond type */,
  "bond_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bond type (e.g., Surety Bond, Cash Bond) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bond type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Misdemeanor, Felony) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_logs" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case log */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with this case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number for the arrest */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court handling the case */,
  "court_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the court appearance */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date of the offense */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_logs_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the arrest record */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrest being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the arrest record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, officer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence record */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the evidence */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the evidence is stored */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the evidence is stored */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the officer who collected the evidence */,
  "collected_date" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warrants" (
  "warrant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warrant */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the warrant */,
  "warrant_number" TEXT /* Warrant number assigned to the warrant */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the warrant was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the warrant (e.g., active, executed) */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name of the judge or authority who issued the warrant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warrant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warrants_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the sentence */,
  "type_of_sentence" TEXT /* Type of sentence issued (e.g., probation, imprisonment) */,
  "length_of_sentence" TEXT /* Length of the sentence */,
  "date_of_sentence" TEXT /* Date the sentence was issued */,
  "probation_officer" TEXT /* Name of the probation officer assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)
